items.hook: Tales of Hulan River was the last work written by Xiao Hong, one of the most talented female literary figures of the Chinese Northeast Writers Group that were especially active in the 1930s and 1940s.

items.hook: Bruno Mars has an unexpected opening before Wembley party starts

items.hook: Maurice Garin wins the first Tour de France.
items.body: Maurice-François Garin was an Italian-French road bicycle racer best known for winning the inaugural Tour de France in 1903, and for being stripped of his title in the second Tour in 1904 along with eight others, for cheating. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.
